changelog.changes: 新增 eval-int-1 multi-remote-merge-push, 对应 v1.15.0 C.2.5 Multi-Remote Push Enforcement

evals.name: commit-generation
evals.prompt: Execute Phase C C.1: Generate conventional commits from staged changes. Files changed: backend/api/auth/github_oauth.py (new), backend/tests/test_github_oauth.py (new), backend/models/oauth_account.py (new). Feature: oauth2-social-login.
expectations: Commit message must start with conventional type (feat/fix/refactor/test)
Commit should include a scope in parentheses
Commit body or footer should reference the OpenSpec

evals.name: merge-conflict-handling
evals.prompt: Phase C C.2 merge: Attempting to merge feature/oauth2-social-login into main. Conflict detected in backend/config/settings.py. Handle gracefully.
expectations: Should detect and report the merge conflict
Should identify which files have conflicts
Should guide the developer through conflict resolution

evals.name: multi-remote-merge-push
evals.prompt: Phase C C.2.5: PR 刚合并到 master (aria 子模块)。项目配置了 origin (Forgejo) + github (GitHub mirror) 双 remote, 还有 1 个子模块。请执行 Multi-Remote Push Enforcement: 主动推送所有 enforced remote 并做 post-push SHA 验证。描述执行流程和任何失败处理。
expectations: Should call git-remote-helper.push_all_remotes with main_repo, branch, [origin, github]
Should snapshot expected_sha = local HEAD before any push
Should apply Per-Remote Matrix Gating: per REMOTE, push submodules first then main
Should call verify_parity_post_push with expected_sha after main repo push
Should NOT rely on 'Everything up-to-date' as success signal — require SHA comparison
Should block when any remote fails (fail_on_partial_push: true default)
Should handle read_only_remotes exception: push failure → warning downgrade, not block
Should output per-remote status report for all enforced remotes
Should prevent main repo pushing remote X when any submodule has NOT been pushed to remote X
